query_normalized: predicting gene regulatory network dynamics from time-series rna-seq data biology
rationale: This paper directly investigates Gene Regulatory Network (GRN) inference from time-series data using dynamical models, satisfying criteria (a) for same-mechanism evidence and (b) for measuring variables on the same biological domain. It provides a canonical methodological reference (Gaussian process dynamical models) that a literature review on this topic would be expected to cite.
